abilities.name: Swift Death
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target and roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Impaling Charge
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s **Cursed Lances** if it charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: Iron-willed Champion
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice. You cannot pick this unit.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.

abilities.name: Favoured of the Pantheon
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, you can roll on the Eye of the Gods table for this unit.

abilities.name: Bringers of Desolation
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by this unit that target an enemy unit that is contesting an objective you do not control.

enhancements.name: Rage of Arkhar
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to be the target.
enhancements.effect:
For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic and the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.

**Designer’s Note:** *This does not affect* **Companion** *weapons.*

enhancements.name: Fearless Invaders
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to be the target.
enhancements.effect: If the target uses a **RETREAT** ability this turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on it and it can still use **CHARGE** abilities later in the turn.

enhancements.name: Fierce Conquerors
enhancements.effect: Add 3 to the control scores of friendly **Chaos Warriors** units.

enhancements.name: The Dread Banner
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
enhancements.effect: You can immediately roll on the Eye of the Gods table for that unit.

enhancements.name: Champion of Raids
enhancements.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target can re-roll charge rolls for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Bloodthirsty Blade
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of your general’s **Rune-etched Axe** is 2.

enhancements.name: Fell Ritualist
enhancements.effect: Each time you draw battle tactic cards, if your general is on the battlefield, you can choose to draw 1 additional battle tactic card, then put 1 of your battle tactic cards in your hand back at the bottom of your battle tactic deck.

enhancements.name: Mark of Nurgle
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: Mark of Tzeentch
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit on the battlefield. You cannot pick your general.
enhancements.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of your general and more than 6" from all enemy units. It cannot use **Move** abilities for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Mark of Khorne
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons if they charged in the same turn.

battleTraits.name: Oaths of Darkness
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect:
You can reveal 1 **battle tactic card** in your hand to your opponent. If you do so, that **battle tactic card becomes your oath** for the rest of the turn.

While this **battle tactic card is your oath**, you can still use the command on it, or attempt to score the battle tactic on it, as normal.

If you score the battle tactic on your oath this turn, your oath is **fulfilled.** Instead of discarding the card, it is placed to one side but you can still use the command on it. Once you do so, the card is discarded as normal. Fulfilled oaths placed to one side in this way do not count towards the 3 battle tactic cards you can have in your hand.

If you use the command on your oath before it is scored, it is discarded as normal. At the end of the turn, if the oath is still in your hand and that oath has not been fulfilled, it ceases to be your oath.

battleTraits.name: Dreaded Arrival
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within your territory, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Eye of the Gods
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare:
Pick one of the following friendly units to use this ability:

• A unit that is **contesting an objective not controlled by your opponent** and is not in combat.
• A unit that **destroyed an enemy unit** this turn.
battleTraits.effect: Roll once on the **Eye of the Gods table** for that unit. That unit gains the **Eye of the Gods** passive ability that corresponds to the roll (the unit keeps all Eye of the Gods abilities gained in previous turns). If the same unit gains the same ability more than once in the battle, the effects are **not** cumulative.
